# Golden PDF Fixtures

Reference PDFs for structural regression testing. These are generated by
`scripts/generate_fixtures.py` and validated against expected properties
(page count, text content, font usage) in `tests/test_fixtures.py`.

## When to regenerate

Run `python scripts/generate_fixtures.py` when:
- A new element type is added (new chart type, new table style, etc.)
- Font metrics change (bundled font update)
- Page layout changes (margins, spacing, default style)

## How it works

Fixtures test structural properties, not byte-for-byte match — PDFs contain
non-deterministic metadata (timestamps, object IDs) that make binary
comparisons brittle. Instead, tests check:
- File starts with `%PDF`
- Expected number of pages (via PyPDF2)
- Expected text content is extractable
- Embedded fonts match expected list
